1799330.name: SAMUDRA - Digital Artbook
1799330.description:
FINDING THE FILE:
After installing please find the PDF in this folder on your PC
C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Samudra
make sure that the game is the latest version update.

This Visual Log is documentation of the world of SAMUDRA - told from the perspective of a Salaryman who worked in a deep-sea factory.

Containing over 50 Pages of:
- Concept Art & Sketches highlighting Story Characters
- Concept Art & Sketches highlighting Story Locations/ Chapters
- Immersive Backstories

The book is essentially an artistic journey that Khayalan Arts had passionately chronicled for over 2 years with their debut game SAMUDRA.
We hope you enjoy this extension of the deep sea journey!
